---
title: "EDA-Assignment-2"
output: html_document
date: "2025-04-03"
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(limma)
library(edgeR)
library(GEOquery)
library(affy) 
library(data.table)
library(pheatmap)
library(R.utils)
library(ggplot2)
library(caret)         
library(glmnet)       
library(randomForest) 
library(e1071)         
library(class)        
library(pROC)
```

```{r}
#raw_dir <- "GSE40732_RAW"

#file_path <- "GSE40732_RAW/GSM999867_534619A04_532_norm_RMA.pair.gz"

#peek <- fread(file_path, nrows = 10)
#print(peek)
```

```{r}
# Path to your data
raw_dir <- "GSE40732_RAW"

# List all normalized .pair.gz files
norm_files <- list.files(raw_dir, pattern = "_norm_RMA.pair.gz$", full.names = TRUE)

# Helper: Read probe intensities from one file
read_pair_file <- function(file) {
  dt <- fread(file)
  dt[, .(PROBE_ID, PM)]
}

# Extract probe IDs from the first file
probe_ids <- fread(norm_files[1])$PROBE_ID

# Create expression matrix
expr_matrix <- sapply(norm_files, function(file) {
  fread(file)[["PM"]]
})

# Assign row and column names
rownames(expr_matrix) <- probe_ids
colnames(expr_matrix) <- gsub("_.*", "", basename(norm_files))  # Sample names
```

```{r}
# Transpose and run PCA
pca <- prcomp(t(expr_matrix), scale. = TRUE)

# Basic PCA plot
pca_df <- as.data.frame(pca$x)
ggplot(pca_df, aes(PC1, PC2)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "PCA of Samples", x = "PC1", y = "PC2")
```

The closer two dots, are, the most similar expression profiles they have. The farther apart the dots are, the more different they are.

```{r}
# Reinstall GEOquery
BiocManager::install("GEOquery", force = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# Load metadata from GEO
gse <- getGEO("GSE40732", GSEMatrix = TRUE)
metadata <- pData(gse[[1]])
colnames(metadata)

# Extract "asthmatic" / "control" label (adjust index if needed)
metadata$condition <- gsub(".*: ", "", metadata$characteristics_ch1)


# Match metadata to expression matrix columns
metadata <- metadata[match(colnames(expr_matrix), rownames(metadata)), ]

# Make sure metadata and expression matrix match
annotation_col <- data.frame(Condition = metadata$condition)
rownames(annotation_col) <- colnames(expr_matrix)

# Pick top 50 most variable genes
top_genes <- apply(expr_matrix, 1, var) %>% sort(decreasing = TRUE) %>% head(50) %>% names()

# Create heatmap
pheatmap(expr_matrix[top_genes, ],
         scale = "row",
         show_colnames = FALSE,
         annotation_col = annotation_col,
         main = "Top 50 Variable Genes - Grouped by Condition",
         fontsize_row = 7)
```

Lol, it's a bit packed but the heatmap shows the high activity vs low activity genes. Red \<- High Activity Blue \<- Low Activity

Some interesting activity here in the very red spot, seems to be mostly asthmatics in that area.

```{r}
# Extract asthma status from metadata
metadata$condition <- ifelse(grepl("TRUE", metadata$`asthma:ch1`), "Asthmatic", "Control")

# Confirm counts
table(metadata$condition)

# Add condition info to PCA data
pca_df$condition <- metadata$condition

# Plot with color by asthma/control
ggplot(pca_df, aes(PC1, PC2, color = condition)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
  labs(title = "PCA: Asthmatic vs Control", color = "Condition")

```

```{r}
# Create a group factor based on asthma status
group <- factor(metadata$condition, levels = c("Control", "Asthmatic"))

# Create design matrix for limma
design <- model.matrix(~0 + group)
colnames(design) <- levels(group)

# Fit the linear model
fit <- lmFit(expr_matrix, design)

# Define the contrast (Asthmatic minus Control)
contrast_matrix <- makeContrasts(Asthmatic - Control, levels = design)

# Apply contrast and empirical Bayes smoothing
fit2 <- contrasts.fit(fit, contrast_matrix)
fit2 <- eBayes(fit2)

# Get top differentially expressed genes
top_genes <- topTable(fit2, adjust = "fdr", number = 20)
knitr::kable(top_genes, caption = "Top 20 Differentially Expressed Genes")

```

```{r}
# Store *all* DE results in 'results'
results <- topTable(fit2, number = Inf, adjust = "fdr")

top_genes <- results %>% 
  arrange(P.Value) %>% 
  slice_head(n = 10)
```

```{r}
ggplot(results, aes(logFC, -log10(P.Value))) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.1, color = "black") +
  geom_point(data = top_genes, aes(logFC, -log10(P.Value)), color = "red", size = 2) +
  geom_text(data = top_genes, aes(label = rownames(top_genes)), vjust = 1.5, size = 3) +
  labs(title = "Volcano Plot Highlighting Top 10 Genes")
```

```{r}
# Keep top 500 most variable genes
top_var_genes <- apply(expr_matrix, 1, var) %>% sort(decreasing = TRUE) %>% head(500) %>% names()
expr_subset <- t(expr_matrix[top_var_genes, ])

# Create dataframe
expr_df <- as.data.frame(expr_subset)
expr_df$condition <- factor(metadata$condition, levels = c("Control", "Asthmatic"))
```

```{r}
set.seed(3888)
train_idx <- createDataPartition(expr_df$condition, p = 0.7, list = FALSE)
train_data <- expr_df[train_idx, ]
test_data  <- expr_df[-train_idx, ]
```

```{r}
preproc <- preProcess(train_data[, -ncol(train_data)], method = c("center", "scale"))
x_train <- predict(preproc, train_data[, -ncol(train_data)]) %>% as.matrix()
x_test <- predict(preproc, test_data[, -ncol(test_data)]) %>% as.matrix()
y_train <- train_data$condition
y_test <- test_data$condition
```

```{r}
lasso_fit <- cv.glmnet(x_train, y_train, alpha = 1, family = "binomial")
lasso_probs <- predict(lasso_fit, x_test, s = "lambda.min", type = "response")
lasso_pred <- ifelse(lasso_probs > 0.5, "Asthmatic", "Control") %>% factor(levels = levels(y_test))
```

```{r}
ridge_fit <- cv.glmnet(x_train, y_train, alpha = 0, family = "binomial")
ridge_probs <- predict(ridge_fit, x_test, s = "lambda.min", type = "response")
ridge_pred <- ifelse(ridge_probs > 0.5, "Asthmatic", "Control") %>% factor(levels = levels(y_test))
```

```{r}
rf_fit <- randomForest(condition ~ ., data = train_data, ntree = 100)
rf_pred <- predict(rf_fit, newdata = test_data)
rf_probs <- predict(rf_fit, newdata = test_data, type = "prob")[, "Asthmatic"]
```

```{r}
svm_fit <- svm(x_train, y_train, kernel = "linear", probability = TRUE)
svm_pred <- predict(svm_fit, x_test)
svm_probs <- attr(predict(svm_fit, x_test, probability = TRUE), "probabilities")[, "Asthmatic"]
```

```{r}
knn_pred <- knn(x_train, x_test, cl = y_train, k = 5)
```

```{r}
cat("\nConfusion Matrix - Lasso\n")
print(confusionMatrix(lasso_pred, y_test))

cat("\nConfusion Matrix - Ridge\n")
print(confusionMatrix(ridge_pred, y_test))

cat("\nConfusion Matrix - Random Forest\n")
print(confusionMatrix(rf_pred, y_test))

cat("\nConfusion Matrix - SVM\n")
print(confusionMatrix(svm_pred, y_test))

cat("\nConfusion Matrix - KNN\n")
print(confusionMatrix(knn_pred, y_test))
```

```{r}
roc_lasso <- roc(y_test, as.numeric(lasso_probs))
roc_ridge <- roc(y_test, as.numeric(ridge_probs))
roc_rf    <- roc(y_test, rf_probs)
roc_svm   <- roc(y_test, svm_probs)

plot(roc_lasso, col = "red", main = "ROC Curves", lwd = 2)
plot(roc_ridge, col = "blue", add = TRUE, lwd = 2)
plot(roc_rf, col = "green", add = TRUE, lwd = 2)
plot(roc_svm, col = "purple", add = TRUE, lwd = 2)
legend("bottomright", legend = c("Lasso", "Ridge", "Random Forest", "SVM"),
       col = c("red", "blue", "green", "purple"), lwd = 2)
```

```{r}
auc_df <- data.frame(
  Model = c("Lasso", "Ridge", "Random Forest", "SVM"),
  AUC = c(
    auc(roc_lasso),
    auc(roc_ridge),
    auc(roc_rf),
    auc(roc_svm)
  )
)
print(auc_df)
```
